About Organization

The Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) is a government agency responsible for conducting exams and selecting candidates for various government jobs in the state of Bihar, India.

The BPSC was established in 1956 and is headquartered in Patna, Bihar.

About the Programme

The BPSC Stenographer Exam 2026 is a government job exam conducted by the BPSC to select candidates for the post of Stenographer.

The exam is open to Indian citizens who meet the eligibility criteria, and the selected candidates will be appointed as Stenographers in the government of Bihar.
